---
title: "Datasets Starter Pack"
subtitle: "The benchmarks and models that already exist for crisis AI — and the biases newcomers should know about before training on them."
---

::: {.callout-note}
## More coming soon

This page is being rebuilt. We're putting together a curated, vetted starter pack of datasets and benchmarks for crisis AI — each with its known limitations and biases flagged up front, the same way the rest of this site treats sourcing.

Check back soon, or open an issue at <https://github.com/samsaranc/ai-for-emergency-management/issues> if there's a dataset you think belongs here.
:::
